chunks.text: \chapter{Common DCL Commands and their UNIX\TM\ Equivalents} Table \ref{dclequiv} gives common DCL commands and the command(s) with the equivalent function on UNIX\TM\. (Note: Some of the following command equivalents are specific to the C shell.)

command equivalents are specific to the C shell.) \begin{table}[hb] \isucaption{Common DCL Commands and their UNIX\TM\ Equivalents} \label{dclequiv} \begin{center} \begin{tabular}{lll} \hline DCL Command&Qualifier or Keyword&UNIX\TM\ Equivalent\\ \h
